query:
SELECT 
  u.username,
  u.name AS full_name,
  u.email,
  u.systemRole AS role,
  u.jobTitle,
  tc.name AS company_name,
  tc.subscriptionTier AS subscription_tier
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tenant_companies tc ON u.tenantCompanyId = tc.id
WHERE u.username IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY FIELD(u.systemRole, 'developer', 'axiom_owner', 'super_admin', 'company_admin', 'manager', 'user'), tc.name, u.username;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3REGGwCEMbpiL33.root --database mLLZEfmfSEuH47dfeJgVGY --execute 
SELECT 
  u.username,
  u.name AS full_name,
  u.email,
  u.systemRole AS role,
  u.jobTitle,
  tc.name AS company_name,
  tc.subscriptionTier AS subscription_tier
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tenant_companies tc ON u.tenantCompanyId = tc.id
WHERE u.username IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY FIELD(u.systemRole, 'developer', 'axiom_owner', 'super_admin', 'company_admin', 'manager', 'user'), tc.name, u.username;
